content.query:
--delete from [EDW].[test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_invitations]

select * from [ODS].[Test_GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY]
select * from edw.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_invitations
select * from edw.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey
select top 100 * from [RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING]
WHERE AffiliateName='Allied Digital Media'

SELECT 
[AffiliateName]
,[ReportDate]
,[ReportType]
,[Source]
,[SubSource]
,[SubSourceID]
,[Division]
,[LeadID]
,[EntryDate]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,[Product]
,[ProductDescription]
,[Market]
,[CurrentLeadDispositionID]
,[CurrentLeadDisposition]
,[ApptSet]
,[AppointmentSetDate]
,[AppointmentDate]
,[NetIssue]
,[Demo]
,[Sold]
,[JobID]
,[JobStatus]
,[JobContractDate]
,[AffiliateLeadNumber]
,[RenuityLeadScore]
 FROM [OUT].[AFFILIATES_DAILY_REPORT]
 WHERE
 AffiliateName = 'Allied Digital Media'
 and ReportType = 'CPL'
